mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE fence_id = #{fenceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND fence_id = #{fenceId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM fence_alert WHERE alert_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
